# Validation

This document can be used to validate the inputs and result of the execution of the upgrade transaction which you are signing.

> [!NOTE]
> Hashes regenerated against the standard kona-client v1.6.0-rc.2 cannon64-kona prestate (`0x0337ecb3604c0b40c352e0c7711beb17a212d583f4fe956fd8d66e29ad5f9025`). Re-simulate if the prestate or any nonce changes before signing.

## Expected Domain and Message Hashes

First, validate the domain and message hashes. These values should match both the values on your ledger and the values printed to the terminal when you run the task.

> [!CAUTION]
>
> Before signing, ensure the below hashes match what is on your ledger.
>
> ### Security Council (`0xc2819DC788505Aac350142A7A707BF9D03E3Bd03`)
>
> - Domain Hash:  `0xdf53d510b56e539b90b369ef08fce3631020fbf921e3136ea5f8747c20bce967`
> - Message Hash: `0x87f07bc9fe345c16f6630cddefe58d9ae8bf2f392ed0c615a670ab72719eb1de`
>
> ### Foundation Upgrade Safe (`0x847B5c174615B1B7fDF770882256e2D3E95b9D92`)
>
> - Domain Hash:  `0xa4a9c312badf3fcaa05eafe5dc9bee8bd9316c78ee8b0bebe3115bb21b732672`
> - Message Hash: `0xa955382f55985d5087ed8139a5235601644c91f06e75652277cfd88af90096eb`

## Task Calldata

```

```
